title: Eber #1443
definition:
Eber or Hebrew = "the region beyond"

 1) the son of Salah, and great grandson of Shem,  one of Abraham's
    ancestors
nasbUsage:

 1) the son of Salah, and great grandson of Shem,  one of Abraham's
    ancestors

    NASB:  Heber, an ancestor of Christ:
